title: play kube: missing documentation for what is supported and what is not
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

I am trying to use podman play kube. It seems that there are some features that are not supported. I could not find documentation that explained the supported sections for pod kind.
Specifically, I am trying to use environment variables with a value from fieldRef.
Pod spec example:
```yml
spec:
  containers:
  - name: dummypod
    image: quay.io/fedora/fedora:34
    command: [ "/bin/bash", "-c", "--" ]
    args: [ "while true; do sleep 3600; done;" ]
    env:
      - name: fieldRefVar
        valueFrom:
          fieldRef:
            fieldPath: metadata.name
```

comments.body:
To be clear, I used k8s kind Pod and not Deployment.
Here's a list of paths in podSpec that I tested and did not work for me:
- container.env.valueFrom.fieldRef
- container.env.valueFrom.resourceFieldRef
- container.lifecycle
- container.livenessProbe
- container.readinessProbe
- container.startupProbe
- container.resources

If possible, I would appreciate it if someone could verify my findings.

@ydayagi thanks for the issue, I am working on updating the man pages with info on the fields that are currently supported. We are continuously adding support for more fields, please feel free to open issues for specific fields or even a PR :)

We only support env from secret and configmap right now. The fields you posted above are not supported yet.
Yes Issues and PRs are very welcome.
thanks. is there a field/path that is more urgent than the others? one that you did not start working on?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@ydayagi Are you interested in documenting what is and is not supported?

> @ydayagi Are you interested in documenting what is and is not supported?

I see that @umohnani8 is working on it. https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/12756#issuecomment-1010949820
I can document the parts I know of. where should I add this doc?

@rhatdan @umohnani8 I think we should consider bumping the priority of this issue.  Once the systemd integration of play kube is done (RUN-1287), I expect a noticeable increase of `play kube` users.  Knowing what is (not) supported will be important.
I agree, would also help us figure out what features we want to add.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Part 1 of docs was https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/14318.
Will open another PR with additional docs
Is it time to close this issue?  Or do we need to wait for the additional docs?
Let's wait for the follow up PR and I will close this issue with that one
The follow up PR was merged in https://github.com/containers/podman
